excludedAssets.rationale: Low-signal backup-style data; excluded from default lookup to reduce noise.
Draft note data; excluded from default lookup.
Font binaries and sidecar licenses require separate asset-pack approval.
Script behavior is ported selectively to Node validators; original scripts are not runtime dependencies.
CLI detection/template lessons only; installer/update command behavior is not imported.
Demo, screenshots, and CI do not belong in plugin runtime.
